#semuaakanbaikbaiksaja #rezarahadian #christinehakim 

Semua Akan Baik-Baik Saja mengikuti kisah perjuangan seorang ibu dalam keluarga sederhana, yang hidup bukan untuk bermimpi, melainkan untuk bertahan. Di balik keseharian yang tampak biasa, sang ibu yang diketahui bernama ibu Wida, diam-diam memikul beban ekonomi, emosi, dan harapan demi memastikan anak-anaknya tetap memiliki masa depan yang lebih baik.

Nantikan Semua Akan Baik-Baik Saja, tayang mulai 13 Mei 2026 di XXI!

snippet.title: Katy Perry - The One That Got Away (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Katy Perry - The One That Got Away
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life

Music preparation service by Poppy Hanadhy

Mastered by Bennytho Siahaan

V1A 
Aku ingin jadi teman nyamanmu 
Tempat kau hilangkan keluh kesahmu 
Kita berbincang tak karuan tanpa beban 
Dan juga khayalan Tentang Masa depan

Ku tak ingin ini cepat berlalu 
Waktu yang kupunya denganmu 
Kita berdansa dan tertawa gandeng tangan 
Semoga bergema sampai selamanya

Dunia pasti ada akhirnya 
Bintang bintang pun ada umurnya 
Maka tenang saja kita di sini berdua 
Nikmati sementara yang ada

Bersandar padaku taruh di bahuku relakan semua bebas semaumu 
Percayalah ini sayang terlewatkan 
Kusampaikan dalam nyanyian bergema sampai selamanya

Nama Game : Grow Huge for Brainrots
Link Game : https://www.roblox.com/games/75761657311029

🔰 Sekarang kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat VOICE di Room Santuy yang ada di Discord. Jadwal ga tentu, tapi biasanya kalau sore sekitar jam 15.30 - 16.30 WIB. Baca lagi bagian bawah biar kalian benar-benar mengerti 🗿

Sebelum JOIN, tolong baca ini ya 🙏😁
✅ Izin sama orang tua & tanya boleh ga install dan main Discord? Btw, discord punya aturan kalau mau buat akun mesti umur 13+
✅ PENTING!! Ikut MABAR atau RECORD mungkin agak susah karena ramai yang tungguin bang Hayo, sedangkan game Roblox server-nya terbatas
✅ Record juga GA SELALU MABAR  karena beberapa game ga boleh rusuh & mesti diatur sebaik mungkin
✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya
✅ Kadang bang Hayo harus pakai LINK PRIVATE SERVER biar record-nya lebih lancar. Kirim link-nya di Discord & untuk cara JOIN baca di cara-ikut-record yang ada di Discord
✅ Baca PERATURAN GROUP & PERTANYAAN UMUM  di Discord untuk kepentingan bersama
✅ Di group ini kalian juga bisa mencari KAWAN yang mungkin cocok sama kalian dan bisa main bareng. Ga perlu fokus sama bang Hayo saja karena bang Hayo ga mampu standby 24 jam
✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

🔰 Bang, kenapa ga bisa chat di Discord?
Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

[Verse 1: Sabrina Carpenter]
I'm sorry but, don't wanna talk
I need a moment before I go, it's nothing personal
I draw the blinds, they don't need to see me cry

[Pre-Chorus: Sabrina Carpenter]
So then, when I'm finished
I'm all 'bout my business and ready to save the world
I'm taking my misery, make it my bitch

So take aim and fire away
I've never been so wide awake
No, nobody but me can keep me safe
And I'm on my way
The blood moon is on the rise
The fire burning in my eyes
No, nobody but me can keep me safe
And I'm on my way

[Instrumental Break: Farruko]
Blep, yah, yah
Farru

Y me cansé de luchar y de guerrear en vano
De estar en la línea de fuego y de meter la mano

Y tú no ves que lo hago porque te amo (Pu-pu-pu-pum)

[Pre-Chorus: Farruko]
Pero ya (Ya), no tengo más na' que hacer aquí (Aquí)

De mi propio camino, seguiré lejos de ti

[Chorus: Sabrina Carpenter]
So take aim and fire away
I've never been so wide awake
No, nobody but me can keep me safe
And I'm on my way
The blood moon is on the rise (Is on the rise, na-na)
The fire burning in my eyes (The fire burning in my eyes, no)
No, nobody but me can keep me safe
And I'm on my way

[Instrumental Break: Farruko]
Blep
I'm on my way

[Bridge: Sabrina Carpenter]
Everybody, everybody keep me safe
Everybody, everybody keep me safe
Everybody, everybody keep me safe
Everybody, everybody keep me safe
Everybody, everybody on my way

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All (Lyrics)

Follow Bruno Mars:
https://instagram.com/brunomars
https://facebook.com/brunomars
https://x.com/brunomars
http://brunomars.com

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
For just the chance to win your heart
You could set the bar beyond the stars
I'll do anything, anything you ask me to

[Pre-Chorus]
Say you want the moon
Watch me learn to fly
Ain't no mountain you could point to
I wouldn't climb

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

[Verse 2]
To hold your hand and call you mine
I'm tryna be your man 'til the end of time
Oh, I'll do anything, anything you ask me to

[Pre-Chorus]
I would run through a fire
Just to be by your side
If your heart's on the line
You could take mine

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you

[Bridge]
I would swim across the sea just to show you
Sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on
To prove that you belong here in my arms

[Pre-Chorus]
Say you want the moon
Watch me learn to fly
Ain't no mountain you could point to
I wouldn't climb

[Chorus]
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you
It's crazy, but it's true
There's nothing I won't do
I'd risk it all for you
